ingredients_text: 73% chicken, 16% buffalo style hot sauce (water, barley malt vinegar, rice vinegar, maize starch, sugar, salted butter [butter (milk), salt], lime juice concentrate, salt, cayenne pepper, jalapeño pepper, garlic powder, paprika extract), 8% marinade (water, glucose syrup, salt, stabilisers: diphosphates, triphosphates, modified maize starch, acidity regulators: sodium citrates, citric acid, yeast extract), 3% barbecue flavour glaze (sugar,  maize flour, salt, tomato powder, dextrose, yeast extract, smoke flavouring, modified maize starch, colours: plain caramel, paprika extract, acidity regulators: citric acid, malic acid, cayenne pepper, onion powder, garlic powder),
